## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and the main implementation details.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] Relevant manual test, if any

## Checklist

- [ ] No real secrets, local config, runtime data, or logs are included.
- [ ] New scripts or E2E files are listed explicitly in `package.json`.
- [ ] Documentation changes are mirrored in the matching language pair.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is described in `SECURITY.md`, `PRIVACY.md`, or `FUNCTIONAL_BOUNDARIES.md` when needed.
